channel.title: Misc on SuperTsumu
channel.description: Recent content in Misc on SuperTsumu

item.title: ICTF_2022/Grep
item.description: Home Grep - 60 points - Misc Description Grab That Easy Flag Script Kiddie! Creator: Mohin Paramasivam The Writeup Figure 1: Quote by Ken Thompson In this challenge, we are given the file named “Readme”, which you can download here. According to my expert analysis, “Readme” is a file containing ±14 Kilobytes of ASCII text data. To read the raw data off the terminal, I used the unix command “cat” to print the data in the file:

item.title: Darchrow
item.description: Home Darchrow - 100 points - Misc We get the following image from this challenge: Instead of using OCR software to get the text out of the image, I meticulously typed the letters for the sake of accuracy: ACZQQOKLHUALHPTXGXKEPWTLDJUCEORHRKTQRTVKXOWRBYACBUKRUPCEA QRAKMZRJHCEHZJWJKSGTLTMOXTEJHLPPEHXJBQQWKXYQNKFTOKBJUVFRUF CSQMTXHTTDJSOFWHYNSOHVEZGQVURJFJALJEXQWWYWIZBJLMOYDMGNXOMR MLQRSYWZHJGBLCSHNMYFXESJNFBBITRXHKZYQGYIPEUYTNFXSSPCXIZJMR CTLHUUHBFEXIVBMEURYMPAZATXUVNVQRSLPFVWWBBUHOEMXYRPMLTYZXLH SAPMMMQOEHXKQCDWBSWDMTFMSMFBNCQGMQHHJPQYKJPZNMYYDKZYZXUHOO HAIAFGMDBMYAEQPRSUVQKGEZSA Looking up “Darchrow consumer of worlds” on the web, we can find a Dota 2 character named Darchrow, the Enigma. I immediately placed the ciphertext into dcode.

item.title: Rayquaza
item.description: Home Rayquaza - 50 points - Misc In this challenge, we were given the file “1337Pikachu”. Using the Linux “file” command tells us that we are dealing with a Game Boy Advance ROM / GBA file. After spending about an hour trying different Game Boy Advance emulators, I got to boot the ROM using VisualBoyAdvance after giving the file a .gba file extension: And after a few minutes of gameplay, I managed to get the flag from the fat guy as stated in the challenge description:

item.title: Redpoint
item.description: Home Redpoint - 443 points - Misc This image is given for the challenge: After using every forensics tool I know on the image, I have come to the conclusion that the flag was the screwdriver. Flag: BO1337{screwdriver}
